note: Largest cumulative US aid recipient. $3.8B/yr guaranteed under 2016 MOU (10-year $38B deal). Additional $14.5B emergency aid for Gaza operations in 2024. Total since 1948: $310B+. Uniquely allowed to spend 25% of military aid on domestic defense industry (all other recipients must buy American).
controversies: Weapons used in Gaza (45,000+ killed), West Bank settlements, Amnesty International apartheid designation, ICJ genocide case.
